calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-062 Phase 2a monomodal-collapse falsifier (ARM_0 vs ARM_1c on SD-054 reef)
items.note: GAP-B of arc_062_rule_apprehension_plan.md. Phase 2a single-arm core 2-arm contrast (ARM_0 use_gated_policy=False vs ARM_1c use_gated_policy=True with full 3-stream discriminator on (z_world, z_self, z_harm_a) per Pull A R1 verdict) at ARM_1_med density (V3-EXQ-522 baseline). Pre-registered acceptance: PASS = >=2 of {C2 state-dependence, C3 risk-type dissociation, C4 cross-seed variation} hold across seeds with no F1 monomodal-collapse or F2 biologically-inverted signature; C1 density-tracking marked non_contributory (single-density Phase 2a; deferred to Phase 2b density-gradient sub-arms). Tags claim_ids=[MECH-309, ARC-062, SD-029] with evidence_direction_per_claim. PASS unblocks Phase 3 (closes commitment_closure_plan.md GAP-1). FAIL routes through plan Phase 2 deliverable 5 falsification chain.

items.title: SD-017 sleep-phase discriminative pair, Phase 2 retest (FULL_4_PHASE_ON vs NO_SLEEP_BASELINE)
items.note: GAP-2 of sleep_substrate_plan.md. 2 of 4 remaining Tier-1 successors after V3-EXQ-265a PASS 2026-05-09T20:12Z + V3-EXQ-500a queued 2026-05-09T20:43Z. Discriminative pair (FULL_4_PHASE_ON vs NO_SLEEP_BASELINE) x 3 seeds; preloads identical N=20 deterministic prototype buffers and runs K=3 sleep cycles. Phase 2 substrate template (sd016_writepath_mode='off', sd016_diversification_weight=0.5, use_per_stream_vs=True, use_anchor_sets=True, use_sd039_anchor_payload=True) applied to BOTH arms; use_sleep_loop=True only on FULL_4_PHASE_ON arm. Single-claim ['SD-017']; supersedes='V3-EXQ-503' set in BOTH queue entry and manifest. Pre-registered acceptance: C1 cumulative_sws_writes (ARM_A>=K, ARM_B==0), C2 ctxmem_state_change (ARM_A>=0.10, ARM_B<=1e-6), C3 cumulative_rem_rollouts (ARM_A>=K, ARM_B==0), C4 cross-arm |M2 diff| > 0.20 (calibrated from --dry-run smoke: ARM_A=5.03, ARM_B=0.0; tolerance set to 0.20 above C2 floor 0.10, ~25x safety margin). PASS=C1 AND C2 AND C3 AND C4 across >=2/3 seeds. Five-row docstring interpretation grid covers PASS / C1+C3 substrate-fail / C2-only-fail / C4-only-fail (cross-arm collapse) / C2+C3 joint-mode failure. emit_outcome contract on every code path; ASCII-only print. Smoke PASS in 0.1s on Mac 2026-05-09T21:31Z.

items.title: SD-017 + ARC-045 + MECH-166 context-cond harm threshold, Phase 2 retest (3-cond x 5-seed multi-claim, per-seed diagnostics)
items.note: GAP-2 of sleep_substrate_plan.md. 4 of 4 (LAST and biggest) Tier-1 successors after V3-EXQ-265a PASS 2026-05-09T20:12Z + V3-EXQ-500a queued 2026-05-09T20:43Z + V3-EXQ-503a queued 2026-05-09T21:31Z. 3 conditions (WAKING_ONLY / SWS_ONLY / SWS_THEN_REM) x 5 seeds = 15 runs. Multi-claim ['SD-017', 'ARC-045', 'MECH-166']; supersedes='V3-EXQ-436' set in BOTH queue entry and manifest. Phase 2 substrate template (sd016_writepath_mode='off', sd016_diversification_weight=0.5, use_per_stream_vs=True, use_anchor_sets=True, use_sd039_anchor_payload=True) applied to ALL 3 conditions; use_sleep_loop=True / sws_enabled=True / rem_enabled=True toggle per-condition (sleep arms only). Acceptance redesigned to signed-|diff| shape per 265a template (replacing original 436's direction-only checks): C1 (SD-017) slot_cosine_sim signed |diff| between SWS_THEN_REM and WAKING_ONLY > 0.03 in >=2/5 seeds; C2 (MECH-166) harm_rate_dangerous signed |diff| > 0.005 in >=2/5 seeds; C3 (baseline) harm_rate_safe < 0.05 in >=9/15 runs (secondary); C4 (ARC-045) slot_separation > 0.3 in SWS_THEN_REM in >=2/5 seeds (secondary). PASS = C1 AND C2 (multi-claim signed-difference behavioural test). KEY 436a-specific feature: per-seed distribution diagnostics emitted in aggregated.per_seed (slot_cosine_sim, slot_separation, harm-rate signed diffs per seed) to expose seed-level heterogeneity vs mean-only summaries (motivated by 265a cross-seed split: sleep-adds / saturates / sleep-collapses pattern). C4 |diff| tolerance tightened to 0.03 (from 265a's 0.05) for 5-seed cohort sensitivity. evidence_direction_per_claim mandatory. Five-row docstring interpretation grid (C1+C2 PASS / C1-pass-C2-fail / C1-fail-C2-pass / C1+C2 FAIL / C3 FAIL only). emit_outcome contract on every code path; ASCII-only print. Smoke PASS Mac 2026-05-09T21:32Z.

items.title: SD-017 action_bias_div discriminative pair, Phase 2 substrate retest (supersedes V3-EXQ-418a)
items.note: GAP-2 Tier-1 successor for sleep_substrate_plan.md (SD-017 action_bias_div retest cohort; alongside V3-EXQ-265a PASS, V3-EXQ-500a, V3-EXQ-503a, V3-EXQ-436a). Applies the validated Phase 2 substrate template (sd016_writepath_mode='off', sd016_diversification_weight=0.5, use_per_stream_vs=True, use_anchor_sets=True, use_sd039_anchor_payload=True, use_sleep_loop=True) to base script v3_exq_418a_*.py. Existing 418a substrate (sd016_enabled=True, shy_enabled=False, LAMBDA_TERRAIN=0.1, terrain_loss in E1 training) preserved -- the 5 Phase 2 flags layer on top. WITH_SLEEP_SD016 vs WITHOUT_SLEEP_SD016 x 3 seeds [42, 49, 56]. P0=50 + P1=150 + eval=30 episodes. Acceptance: C1 action_bias_div(WITH_SLEEP) >= 0.05 in 2/3, C2 WITH > WITHOUT in 2/3, C4 |signed_diff| > 0.05 in 2/3 (Phase 2 acceptance shape per EXQ-265a precedent; either direction informative). PASS = C1 AND C2 AND C4. C3 slot_diversity is secondary diagnostic. Five-row docstring interpretation grid covers PASS / C2-fail (substrate-not-sleep) / C4-fail (sub-tolerance) / C1-fail (cue_action_proj confound persists) / C1+C4 (miscalibrated absolute threshold). ID is 418l (NOT 418c as in plan-of-record GAP-2 row): 418c is in runner_status.completed (silent-skip footgun); 418{a..k} all used. Update sleep_substrate_plan.md GAP-2 owner_exqs entry 418c -> 418l on completion. Smoke PASS 2026-05-09T21:32Z (validate_experiments OK; --dry-run end-to-end through 6 cells with 5 Phase 2 flags wired).
